mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO follows(follower_id, following_id) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.sql: u.user_id AS sellerId, u.name AS name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows f WHERE f.following_id = u.user_id) AS followerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products p WHERE p.seller_id = u.user_id) AS productCount
mapper.select: SELECT FROM follows fo JOIN users u ON fo.following_id = u.user_id WHERE fo.follower_id = #{buyerId} ORDER BY fo.follow_id DESC
SELECT FROM users u WHERE u.user_id = #{sellerId} AND u.role = 'SELLER'
